case_title: TENDERLOIN NEIGHBORHOOD DEVELOPMENT CORPORATION VS. KENNETH DE LA CRUZ ET AL

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT DE LA CRUZ, KENNETH
